title: Parallel Routes
description: Multiple caravans allow parallelism: send one caravan out, then another to better split the month's price opportunities. This enables exploiting time-sensitive arbitrage before competitors can react.
definition-of-done: Multiple caravans can operate simultaneously. Caravans can be dispatched at different times. Price timing advantages visible. Route scheduling UI.
testing-plan: Verify multiple simultaneous caravans. Test staggered dispatch timing. Verify price timing effects. Test scheduling interface.
